title: LLM Provider Routing Inconsistency
essence: Provider normalization (grok->xai) and endpoint mismatches cause API call failures
symptoms: Chat responses fail with API errors
Fallback between providers doesn't work properly
repro_steps: Observe API call fails with routing error
Check console for provider mismatch logs
root_cause: Provider names are normalized (grok->xai) but endpoint configurations and API key handling are inconsistent across providers
do_not_do: Use different API key retrieval patterns per provider
Assume all providers use same endpoint format
guardrails: Validate provider configuration before API calls
Implement consistent error handling per provider type
prevent_tests: Test all provider configurations with valid keys
Verify API key retrieval for each provider

evidence.notes: Affects chat reliability - users see cryptic API errors
